title: Sour and Flaky Chinese Veggie Toast
description: This Cantonese-inspired dish features a flaky texture with a tangy cucumber topping for a delightful date-night snack or light meal.
instructions: Slice the cucumber into thin rounds and sprinkle lightly with salt. Let sit for about 10 minutes, then rinse and pat dry.
Mix olive oil or flaxseed oil with lemon juice, water, and minced garlic in a bowl until well combined.
Brush each slice of bread on both sides generously with the dressing mixture.
Arrange cucumber slices over the bread to form a decorative pattern. You can also layer them for a more uniform look if desired.
Bake in the oven for about 10 minutes or until the edges are golden and crispy. If you prefer a crispier texture, bake for an additional minute on each side.
Remove from oven and serve immediately.
